item.harvest-statue.name: Harvest Statue
item.harvest-statue.description: A small Junimo statue. Place indoors to have the Junimos gather crops each morning.
item.parrot-pot.name: Parrot Pot
item.parrot-pot.description: A decorative parrot pot. Place on the Ginger Island farm to have parrots gather crops each morning.
message.junimos.full: The Junimos at the {{location}} couldn't harvest due to lack of storage!
message.junimos.ate: The Junimos at the {{location}} ate harvested crops due to lack of storage!
message.junimos.harvested: The Junimos at the {{location}} have harvested crops.
message.parrots.full: The Parrots at the Ginger Island farm couldn't harvest due to lack of storage!
message.parrots.ate: The Parrots at the Ginger Island farm ate harvested crops due to lack of storage!
message.parrots.harvested: The Parrots at the Ginger Island farm have harvested crops.
placement.harvest-statue.only-indoors: The Harvest Statue can only be placed indoors.
placement.harvest-statue.one-per-locatio: Only one Harvest Statue can be placed in this location.
placement.parrot-pot.only-island: The Parrot Pot can only be placed on the Ginger Island farm.
placement.parrot-pot.one-only: Only one Parrot Pot can be placed.
